Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host 'Downloading Flutter 3.41.4...'
\\$ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/windows/flutter_windows_3.41.4-stable.zip' -OutFile 'D:\\flutter_windows_3.41.4-stable.zip'
Write-Host 'Download complete.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host 'Extracting Flutter SDK to D:\\...'
\\$ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'
Expand-Archive -Path 'D:\\flutter_windows_3.41.4-stable.zip' -DestinationPath 'D:\\' -Force
Write-Host 'Extraction complete.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'
Write-Host 'Downloading Android cmdline-tools...'
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-win-14742923_latest.zip' -OutFile 'D:\\cmdline-tools.zip'
Write-Host 'Done.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('ProgressPreference', 'SilentlyContinue'\)
Expand-Archive -Path 'D:\\cmdline-tools.zip' -DestinationPath 'D:\\cmdline-tools-temp' -Force
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'D:\\Programs\\AndroidSDK\\cmdline-tools\\latest' -Force | Out-Null
Get-ChildItem 'D:\\cmdline-tools-temp\\cmdline-tools' | Move-Item -Destination 'D:\\Programs\\AndroidSDK\\cmdline-tools\\latest' -Force
Write-Host 'Done'
Test-Path 'D:\\Programs\\AndroidSDK\\cmdline-tools\\latest\\bin\\sdkmanager.bat'
" 2>&1)
